days.label: Day 2
days.title: Design Offices Frankfurt & Deutsche Bundesbank
days.about: A full day at Design Offices Frankfurt opens with the inaugural address, keynote dialogue and an interactive policy workshop. The afternoon moves to the Deutsche Bundesbank GeldMuseum for an exclusive lecture and city experience.

items.title: Welcome & Inaugural Address - Team YEF Frankfurt (CIPES)
Keynote Dialogue & Interactive Exchange, followed by Q&A Session, with Executive Director Mr Hassan Mehar
items.description: Exploring the background of CIPES, the YEF Series, and discussing the evolving global economic realities, and the role of emerging leaders in shaping inclusive, resilient, and cooperative economic futures.

items.title: Policy Workshop: Designing Solutions for Contemporary Economic Challenges
items.description: An interactive session where delegates collaborate to analyze real-world economic challenges and develop practical, policy-oriented recommendations for governments, institutions, and international stakeholders.

items.title: Institutional Visit & Exclusive Lecture at the Deutsche Bundesbank GeldMuseum
items.description: A special lecture series focusing on the institutional aspects and core activities of the German central bank, and the objectives, instruments, and strategy of the Eurosystem's monetary policy.

days.label: Day 3
days.title: Delegate Presentations & Closing
days.about: The closing day at Rivvers Frankfurt City Coworking Space features delegate presentation sessions, followed by closing remarks and wrap-up. Venue location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/ZVFHqmmyrCLcmzjf8

items.title: Delegate Presentations
items.venue: Rivvers Frankfurt City – Coworking Space, Baseler Str. 48, 60329 Frankfurt am Main
